{{Quote|You'd need a twisted mind to design a Podracer the way Farwan & Glott did. But you'd need to be totally insane to actually fly one.|Anonymous comment on [[Neva Kee/Legends|Neva Kee's]] [[Podracer/Legends|podracer]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Episode I Insider's Guide">[[Star Wars: Episode I Insider's Guide|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Insider's Guide'']]</ref>}}
The '''FG 8T8-Twin Block2 Special''' was a [[Podracer/Legends|podracer]] design produced by [[Farwan & Glott/Legends|Farwan & Glott]] prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].

==Characteristics==
The 8T8-Tracer's design was unusual in the fact that the cockpit was joined to the engines forward of their intakes via fixed, fully faired brackets. By contrast, all other podracer designs featured separate gondolas which trailed the pod's engines and were fastened to them with flexible cords which transmitted commands input by the vehicle's pilot to the engines, which were in turn bound by [[Energy binder/Legends|energy binders]]. With the Twin Block2 Special, the need for such devices was eliminated, making the craft bear more of a resemblance to a traditional [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]].<ref name="EV" /> However, this configuration also put the pilot at greater risk of injury or death from head-on collisions. Because of this threat, the pod put heavy emphasis on turning, acceleration and braking power over speed.

The cockpit was aerodynamic and fully enclosed, including a factory-equipped ejection system rare in factory customs and luxury lines. Despite this, the model is among the slowest podracers on the market due to its weight and overbearing pilot assistance.<ref name="EV" />

==History==
The podrace pilot [[Neva Kee/Legends|Neva Kee]] flew a Twin Block2 Special during the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] won by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. Kee performed very well in the first lap of the race, but in the second lap he simply vanished from the track. He was believed to have disappeared somewhere in the [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. [[San Maxus]] also piloted one before it was destroyed during a race on [[Mon Gazza/Legends|Mon Gazza]]. Maxus was nearly killed in the collision.

During [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], when the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] was intensifying, a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] acquired a podracer that looked very similar to the FG 8T8-Twin. This podracer was believed to be a mere replica, and not the same vehicle piloted by Neva Kee.

==Behind the scenes==
The cover art ''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'' depicts [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] piloting [[Neva Kee/Legends|Neva Kee's]] pod. The story does not appear to have any connection to Neva, however, and the vehicle does not appear in the story. Skywalker actually pilots the rebuilt podracer of [[Ratts Tyerell/Legends|Ratts Tyerell]].
